title: Rotten Tomatoes' 2026 Oscar Predictions: Best Supporting Actress
text: Rotten Tomatoes predicts that Wunmi Mosaku will win Best Supporting Actress for her role in Sinners. The article notes that Mosaku's predicted win comes with a possible upset contender: Teyana Taylor from One Battle After Another. The prediction reflects the competitive nature of this awards season, noting that only one of the four acting contests looks to be decided, highlighting the unpredictability surrounding several major categories, including the supporting actress race. Rotten Tomatoes based its predictions on industry buzz, the quiet whispers in various tastemakers' circles, and post-screening Q&As, as well as their Awards Leaderboard tracking wins across various guild ceremonies leading up to Oscar night.
